steps.title: Use the dense-prose clue
steps.content: The text says readers must "penetrate" Kant's "frustratingly dense prose." The blank describes how his works may seem at first glance before readers reach the influential ideas.

steps.title: Choose the unclear meaning
steps.content: Choice A means authoritative, which is not the first-impression problem. Choice C means based on observation or experiment, and choice D means superficially easy, the opposite of dense. The remaining word means unclear or difficult to understand, matching the context. The answer is B.
